workContext.title: Refactor the read path and materializer so the repo-wide summary ref is a compact derived read model with explicit freshness visibility and authoritative fallback reads from shard and runtime refs when needed.
workContext.summary: Added explicit summary freshness diagnostics and stale-summary authoritative fallback; the remaining work is to replace the current always-authoritative comparison path with a cheaper summary-first materialization strategy.
workContext.planTitle: Implement shared coordination v1 architecture hardening
